query:
SELECT
                id,
                status,
                filing_deadline,
                EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (filing_deadline::timestamptz - $1::date::timestamptz))::bigint / 86400 AS days_remaining,
                assigned_investigator_id,
                created_at
            FROM sar_reports
            WHERE status NOT IN ('filed','acknowledged','rejected')
            ORDER BY filing_deadline ASC
